title: May I Kindly Beat the Tar Out of Those Evil Nobles (Pigs)?
overview: When "villainess" Scarlet's fiancé dumps her at a ball, she requests an unexpected form of satisfaction.

title: May I Offer You the Taste of My Fist as the Ladylike Thing to Do?
overview: Scarlet's behavior at the ball has unexpected consequences, including a direct attempt on her life!

title: I Considered a Negotiated Resolution, but May I Biff and Pow Those Noblemen Instead?
overview: To take down the kingdom's slave trader, Scarlet negotiates access to the upcoming slave auction.

title: May I Go to See My Fists' Beloved One (Punching Bag)?
overview: Scarlet infiltrates the slave auction, but her priority is to find and pummel Lord Godwin.

title: May I Clobber This Asshole Prince?
overview: In the aftermath of the slave auction raid, Scarlet and Julius consider their next moves.

title: May I Send This Pig Flying into the Sky?
overview: Scarlet is to accompany Saint Diana's Holy Land Pilgrimage, but the servants of Palmianism stand in her way.

title: May I Carry Out a Plan That Shows a New Side of You?
overview: Diana explores new feelings while Scarlet explores a festival looking for new people to punch.

title: If You Don’t Mind, Can I Give You My Fist As a Handkerchief?
overview: The pilgrimage proceeds to Snowind, where Scarlet and her crew receive a less than warm welcome.

title: May I Explain That This Is Not Something That Just Anyone Can Do?
overview: While threats approach from all sides, Diana is racked with guilt over Scarlet's condition.

title: May I Cook This Thick Cut of Pork Through With Body Punches?
overview: Julius negotiates with an unexpected ally while Scarlet hones her fists for a new kind of feast.

title: As These Appear Undercooked, May I Turn Them Into Mince Meat?
overview: Scarlet and her friends continue to deal with the external threats, but the source of the problem remains.

title: May I Pay Off the Massive Debt My Fists Have Accrued?
overview: Scarlet pursues a final reckoning with Terenezza, but the would-be heroine has a cruel plan in store.

title: May I Ask For One Final Thing?
overview: Scarlet is ready to deal her last punch to Terenezza, but she must first overcome a mind-controlled Julius.
